title: The Small Bakery
content: Near Emma’s apartment, there was a small bakery that opened every morning before sunrise. The smell of fresh bread filled the street and attracted many customers. Emma often stopped there before work to buy croissants and coffee. The owner always greeted people warmly and remembered regular customers by name. Inside the bakery, soft music played while workers prepared cakes and pastries behind the counter. Emma loved the friendly atmosphere and simple routine. Visiting the bakery made busy mornings feel calmer and more pleasant.
